title: BewisclientPack
description: All mods you need to play Minecraft Vanilla (with Bewisclient, Sodium, Iris) - Boosted FPS, Zoom, Fullbright, Shulkerbox Tooltip, Shaders
body:
This modpack adds many mods which boost your FPS and of course it adds Bewisclient.

## Modlist
- Architectury API
- Bewisclient
- Cloth Config API
- Dynamic FPS
- Entity Culling
- Entity Model Features
- Entity Texture Features
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FerriteCore
- ImmediatelyFast
- Indium
- Iris Shaders
- Lithium
- Mod Menu
- More Culling
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- WorldEdit
- Text Placeholder API

## What is Bewisclient
Bewisclient is a Minecraft Mod, made by myself, which adds many features of "normal" clients. I want to get people direct access with some additional Mods (More Infos: modrinth.com/mod/bewisclient)
